description_long: This object is a Kalashnikov-style assault rifle, featuring a long, dark metallic barrel and receiver with a wooden stock, handguard, and pistol grip. The receiver is robust and boxy, with a prominent magazine well and a curved magazine attached below. The wooden components have a reddish-brown finish, contrasting with the black and metallic sheen of the barrel and receiver. The rifle is equipped with standard iron sights, with the front sight post and rear notch clearly visible. The muzzle end is fitted with a simple slant compensator or flash hider. The overall design is utilitarian, with visible screws, pins, and mechanical details typical of military rifles.
description: A Kalashnikov-style assault rifle with a dark metal body and reddish-brown wooden stock, handguard, and grip. It features a curved magazine, iron sights, and a slant muzzle device.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the wooden stock, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel's end, front sight post, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the receiver, magazine, and wooden components from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
